summary: Builds a path string from parsed path components, preferring explicit directory and filename values and otherwise composing missing filename text from stem plus extension.
signature_intent: Accepts a path separator and an object containing parsed path components; returns the formatted path string.
behavior: Selects the directory component when present, otherwise the root component.
Selects the complete filename when present, otherwise joins the stem and extension components, treating missing parts as empty text.
Returns only the filename text when no directory or root component is available.
When the selected directory text exactly matches the root text, concatenates it directly with the filename text.
Otherwise inserts the supplied separator between the selected directory text and filename text.
edge_cases: Falsy directory and root values produce a filename-only result.
A falsy complete filename is replaced by stem-plus-extension composition.
Missing stem or extension components are treated as empty strings for filename composition.
If the selected directory equals the root exactly, no additional separator is inserted.
forbidden_details: Repository and source-location details are intentionally omitted.
Incidental implementation quirks are intentionally omitted.
